transcript.text:
[The plaza owner shows up]
[What in the world...?]
[A strange story of the plaza owner meeting a superwoman...]
[Spicy stir-fried chicken]
[Welcome]
[Just wait, I'll eat everything!!]
[A superwoman]
[Thumbs up]
Hello everyone
I'm here near Kkachisan
Here to eat some ddakgalbi (Spicy stir-fried chicken)
I've been here before for a TV show before
I've visited a couple of times after that too And also ordered delivery here and there
Ta-da Here
[Chuncheon Mooswe Dakgalbi] [Seoul, Gangseo-gu]
That's me over here

[So young...]
[Where has the time gone]
Hello!
You've become prettier
[It's good to see you again, sir]
It smells so nice It's going to be great
-Thanks for coming back -No, thank you!
The grill changed It used to be smaller
It's a cast-iron grill
[So it's all named "Cast-Iron" now]
Well then...
10 servings of dakgalbi?
I'll take 10 servings,
And I need to order extra add-ons, right?
-You ordered a combo last time -Did I get 2 udon add-ons?
1 rice cake,

-And can I order more add-ons later? -Yes
Just a little bit of vegetables, please
[It's already here!]
[Gaze into it]
This is going to be delicious
[Sizzling into perfection]
-You've gotten older now -I was here in 2019
So I was 23 years old
Now I'm 26
Wow, time flies
This is Tzuyang
[Show us your face]
Hello...
I'm so embarrassed now
I watched you yesterday too
Really? Thank you

[Slowly getting cooked!]
[Isn't that Tzuyang?!]
[The plaza owner himself]
She's the best
You're the best
[Happy]
I used to be able to eat 1.8kgs of food
1.8kgs?!
Now I can't even eat 300 grams
I envy people that can eat a lot
I can eat 3kgs of this
[Wow...]
[Eat up!]
Thank you!
It's starting to look so good
[Mouth-watering visuals]

[Cast-iron Dakgalbi (spicy stir-fried chicken)]
Prep real quick with some seaweed soup This isn't spicy though
Bon appetit!
The chicken here is really tender and tasty
That's delicious
It gets better and better over time
But it's already so good
The chicken meat is not dry and it's really tender
You have to dine in to get the real deal
It's just so juicy and moist
[A big piece with some radish]
Eating it like that was so good
Perilla leaf too
Perilla leaf on top of perilla leaf
1 piece of chicken with some sauce
That's so good

It's 2 times better with radish and perilla leaf
Rice cake!
They gave me a lot
So soft
The sauce makes everything so good
I like rice cake, but the flour rice cake is good too
Very soft
Where do they get this from?
The lettuce leaf got burned because of the grill
Crispy lettuce
[It's easy to lose your mind in front of good food]
It's hot, but it's so good
I can't stop
It seemed like there were too many vegetables at first
But after it's cooked, it seems less
I've been told so many times that I close my eyes for every bite

So I'm trying to fix it
But I do it as a habit
I'm not sure if I can fix it
Do I have to keep my eyes open?
[Eagle eyes]
[Angry Mukbang.mp4]
This reminds me of the perilla leaf debate
Who even came up with that?
[Pause for TMI] The perilla leaf debate is "Is it okay for you to separate the leaf for someone of the opposite gender in front of your partner/lover"
Why would you help?
Just eat
[More perilla leaf]
Oh, thank you
How did he know?
I don't really eat fried rice
But there was this one time everyone got mad because I didn't eat fried rice

"How can you not finish with fried rice?" "Just don't do mukbang"
So I'll have some today
If you can eat it all, go ahead
You must have it I highly recommend it
It's a must-have?
It's really good
I'll have some
I can't have the fried rice because I get full But it's good
I can do it
Then you must have some
Excuse me, 1 udon add-on, please
Cute
Just like me
It wasn't spicy before But this feels a little spicy
[Udon noodles]
This sauce is everything

The noodles are so soft that it's hard to grab
Udon tastes great
[Isn't that amazing?]
[I agree]
She eats again after mukbangs
[Holy moly...]
-How old are you? -I'm 26 years old
I've always been a big eater
Eating 10 servings is a superpower
[A superwoman, indeed]
[Finished all the udon noodles]
The rice cake is very chewy and delicious
It's as chewy as the rice-made rice cakes
It's time for some fried rice
Let's move some chicken here
I'll get some fried rice after this

The udon noodles disappeared
Where did it go? Not a trace
Did I order it in my dream?
There it is It wasn't a dream
Perilla leaf
[Please tell me you're full...]
[Please tell me you can't eat anymore...]
[A "superwoman" for a reason]
Pick a plate out
And get the fried rice started
Fried rice for dakgalbi
[She's literally the endgame boss]
Excuse me,
1 order of fried rice, please
[Finally...!]
I'm going to have to try the stew next time It looks good

It's going to be good because the sauce is good
[Here you are]
That was quick
You bring everything out within a minute
[Time for some fried rice]
This looks so good
Can I get cheese on the side, please?
[You look gorgeous...]
[Fried rice surrounded by cheese...]
This looks amazing
I did a good job
How did I think of this? Am I a genius?
Together with some cheese
This is the best
There hasn't been anything like this
The cheese is very milky

Cheese rice
I'm gonna have to say this is better than the dish "cheese rice"
Mix it
The visuals are not important anymore because it goes so well together But I don't want the cheese to get hard, so I'm going to mix it up right now
The old me wouldn't have ordered the fried rice
But now I get to enjoy this thanks to all the suggestions
[A subscriber approaches]
I was able to cheer up more thanks to her while I was going through cancer treatment
Because I couldn't eat anything
She played a big part in giving me hope
[Thankful that she was a positive impact]
I see YouTube comments that share stories like that and it cheers me up too
Really, thank you
Do you guys have Makguksu? (spicy buckwheat noodles)
I'll take the regular one, please
It's good to see someone eat well

Thank you
It's a good thing I got to try their fried rice
I would've missed out
[Gained another nickname today: Superwoman Tzu]
Tasty
I want to eat it with the noodles
[Ask and you shall receive...]
Can't forget about the buckwheat noodles
Look at the glossiness
Give this a try
It doesn't cut right away It's like the ones you have with jokbal (pork trotters)
Very bold flavors too
Very nice
[What this superwoman had so far] 10 servings of dakgalbi, rice cake add-ons, udon noodle add-ons, fried rice, makguksu noodles
It would've been a bummer if I didn't order these
I'm not getting tired of the same taste

It doesn't hit a "wow" right away,
But every bite gets better and better
[Clean, once again]
[Finished the fried rice]
[Tzu-superwoman does it again...!]
[A gift from a fan]
[Her happiness level is through the roof] Thank you for the plum juice
What a great meal that was
[A photo]
[Of course]
[Thumbs up everyone!]
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
